text: I like coffee and tea.
meaning: 我喜欢咖啡和茶。
examples_json: [{"en":"I like cats and dogs.","zh":"我喜欢猫和狗。"}]

text: She is smart and kind.
meaning: 她聪明又善良。
examples_json: [{"en":"He is tall and handsome.","zh":"他又高又帅。"}]

text: I went to the store and bought some milk.
meaning: 我去了商店买了些牛奶。
examples_json: [{"en":"I sat down and read a book.","zh":"我坐下来看书。"}]

text: Do you want tea or coffee?
meaning: 你想喝茶还是咖啡？
examples_json: [{"en":"Do you want this or that?","zh":"你要这个还是那个？"}]

text: Is it big or small?
meaning: 它是大的还是小的？
examples_json: [{"en":"Is it hot or cold?","zh":"是热还是冷？"}]

text: I like him but he doesn't like me.
meaning: 我喜欢他但他不喜欢我。
examples_json: [{"en":"I want to go but I'm busy.","zh":"我想去但我很忙。"}]

text: The food is cheap but it's delicious.
meaning: 食物便宜但很好吃。
examples_json: [{"en":"The hotel is small but clean.","zh":"酒店小但干净。"}]

text: I stayed home because I was sick.
meaning: 我待在家因为我病了。
examples_json: [{"en":"I was late because I missed the bus.","zh":"我迟到了因为我错过了公交。"}]

text: She is happy because she passed the test.
meaning: 她开心因为她通过了考试。
examples_json: [{"en":"He's tired because he worked all night.","zh":"他累了因为他工作了一整夜。"}]

text: Because it rained we stayed inside.
meaning: 因为下雨了我们待在里面。
examples_json: [{"en":"Because I was tired I went to bed early.","zh":"因为我累了所以早早上床。"}]

text: I was tired so I went to bed early.
meaning: 我累了所以我早早上床了。
examples_json: [{"en":"I was hungry so I ate.","zh":"我饿了所以吃了东西。"}]

text: It started to rain so we took a taxi.
meaning: 开始下雨了所以我们打了车。
examples_json: [{"en":"The store was closed so I went home.","zh":"商店关门了所以我回家了。"}]

text: I wanted to go However I was too busy.
meaning: 我想去然而我太忙了。
examples_json: [{"en":"I tried my best However I failed.","zh":"我尽力了然而我失败了。"}]

text: She not only speaks English but also speaks Chinese.
meaning: 她不仅说英语还说中文。
examples_json: [{"en":"He not only sings but also dances.","zh":"他不仅唱歌还跳舞。"}]

text: When I arrived she was cooking.
meaning: 我到的时候她正在做饭。
examples_json: [{"en":"When I called he was sleeping.","zh":"我打电话时他在睡觉。"}]

text: I always listen to music when I run.
meaning: 我跑步时总是听音乐。
examples_json: [{"en":"I drink coffee when I wake up.","zh":"我醒来时喝咖啡。"}]

text: Call me when you get home.
meaning: 你到家时给我打电话。
examples_json: [{"en":"Text me when you arrive.","zh":"你到了给我发短信。"}]

text: I brush my teeth before I go to bed.
meaning: 我睡觉前刷牙。
examples_json: [{"en":"I eat breakfast before I leave.","zh":"我离开前吃早餐。"}]

text: After I finished work I went to the gym.
meaning: 我下班后去了健身房。
examples_json: [{"en":"After I woke up I took a shower.","zh":"我醒来后洗了澡。"}]

text: We played games while we waited.
meaning: 我们等的期间玩了游戏。
examples_json: [{"en":"I listened to music while I worked.","zh":"我工作时听音乐。"}]

text: Please wait here until I come back.
meaning: 请在这里等到我回来。
examples_json: [{"en":"Stay here until it stops raining.","zh":"待在这里直到雨停。"}]

text: If it rains tomorrow I'll stay home.
meaning: 如果明天下雨我就待在家。
examples_json: [{"en":"If I have time I'll call you.","zh":"如果我有时间我打给你。"}]

text: If you study hard you will pass the test.
meaning: 如果你努力学习你会通过考试的。
examples_json: [{"en":"If you practice every day you will get better.","zh":"如果你每天练习你会变得更好。"}]

text: Let me know if you need help.
meaning: 如果你需要帮助就告诉我。
examples_json: [{"en":"Call me if you get lost.","zh":"如果你迷路了给我打电话。"}]

text: I won't go unless you come with me.
meaning: 除非你跟我一起去否则我不去。
examples_json: [{"en":"I won't eat unless I'm hungry.","zh":"除非我饿了我不会吃。"}]

text: You can't enter unless you have a ticket.
meaning: 除非你有票否则你不能进。
examples_json: [{"en":"You can't drive unless you have a license.","zh":"除非你有驾照否则不能开车。"}]

text: If I were you I would take the job.
meaning: 如果我是你我就会接受那份工作。
examples_json: [{"en":"If I were you I would say sorry.","zh":"如果我是你我就会道歉。"}]

text: As long as you try your best it's okay.
meaning: 只要你尽力了就没关系。
examples_json: [{"en":"As long as you're happy I'm happy.","zh":"只要你开心我就开心。"}]

text: I like sports For example I play basketball.
meaning: 我喜欢运动比如我打篮球。
examples_json: [{"en":"I like music For example I listen to pop.","zh":"我喜欢音乐比如我听流行。"}]

text: She is kind Also she is very hardworking.
meaning: 她很善良而且她非常勤奋。
examples_json: [{"en":"He is smart Also he is funny.","zh":"他很聪明而且他很幽默。"}]

text: I like coffee He likes coffee too.
meaning: 我喜欢咖啡他也喜欢咖啡。
examples_json: [{"en":"I like tea He likes tea too.","zh":"我喜欢茶他也喜欢茶。"}]

text: She speaks English and she speaks Japanese as well.
meaning: 她说英语而且她也说日语。
examples_json: [{"en":"He can cook and he can bake as well.","zh":"他会做饭而且他也会烘焙。"}]

text: I don't like coffee I don't like tea either.
meaning: 我不喜欢咖啡我也不喜欢茶。
examples_json: [{"en":"I don't eat meat I don't eat fish either.","zh":"我不吃肉我也不吃鱼。"}]

text: It's a nice restaurant What's more the prices are good.
meaning: 这家餐厅不错而且价格也实惠。
examples_json: [{"en":"It's a good movie What's more it's free.","zh":"这是部好电影而且它是免费的。"}]

text: I want to go but I have no time Besides I don't have money.
meaning: 我想去但我没时间再说我也没钱。
examples_json: [{"en":"I want to travel but I'm busy Besides tickets are expensive.","zh":"我想旅行但我很忙再说票很贵。"}]

text: First I get up Then I take a shower After that I eat breakfast.
meaning: 首先我起床然后我洗澡之后我吃早餐。
examples_json: [{"en":"First I do homework Then I watch TV After that I go to bed.","zh":"首先我做作业然后我看电视之后我上床。"}]

text: I went to the supermarket Next I went to the bank Finally I went home.
meaning: 我去了超市接着去了银行最后回家了。
examples_json: [{"en":"I went to the park Next I went to the library Finally I went home.","zh":"我去了公园接着去了图书馆最后回家了。"}]

text: At first I didn't like the job But later I started to enjoy it.
meaning: 起初我不喜欢这工作但后来我开始喜欢了。
examples_json: [{"en":"At first it was hard But later it became easy.","zh":"起初很难但后来变容易了。"}]

text: While I was cooking my sister was setting the table.
meaning: 我在做饭的时候我妹妹在摆桌子。
examples_json: [{"en":"While I was studying my roommate was sleeping.","zh":"我在学习的时候我室友在睡觉。"}]

text: Before you leave please turn off the lights.
meaning: 在你离开之前请关灯。
examples_json: [{"en":"Before you go please lock the door.","zh":"在你走之前请锁门。"}]

text: After you finish let me know Then we can go together.
meaning: 你做完之后告诉我然后我们可以一起去。
examples_json: [{"en":"After you arrive let me know Then we can meet.","zh":"你到了之后告诉我然后我们可以见面。"}]

text: Well I think it's a good idea.
meaning: 嗯我觉得这是个好主意。
examples_json: [{"en":"Well I'm not sure.","zh":"嗯我不确定。"}]

text: Actually I don't like coffee I prefer tea.
meaning: 其实我不喜欢咖啡我更喜欢茶。
examples_json: [{"en":"Actually I changed my mind.","zh":"其实我改变主意了。"}]

text: By the way did you hear about the party?
meaning: 顺便问一下你听说那个派对了吗？
examples_json: [{"en":"By the way I saw your brother yesterday.","zh":"顺便说一下我昨天看到你哥哥了。"}]

text: Anyway let's get back to the topic.
meaning: 不管怎样我们回到正题吧。
examples_json: [{"en":"Anyway I have to go now.","zh":"不管怎样我现在得走了。"}]

text: I mean it's not that I don't want to go I'm just tired.
meaning: 我是说不是我不想去我只是累了。
examples_json: [{"en":"I mean it's not that I don't like it I just need more time.","zh":"我是说不是我不喜欢我只是需要更多时间。"}]

text: Let me see I think the answer is B.
meaning: 让我想想我觉得答案是B。
examples_json: [{"en":"Let me see I think the answer is C.","zh":"让我想想我觉得答案是C。"}]

text: You know I've always wanted to learn guitar.
meaning: 你知道的我一直想学吉他。
examples_json: [{"en":"You know I've always wanted to travel.","zh":"你知道的我一直想旅行。"}]

text: I wanted to go out but it started to rain so I stayed home and watched a movie.
meaning: 我想出去但开始下雨了所以我待在家看了电影。
examples_json: [{"en":"I wanted to call you but you were busy so I texted you.","zh":"我想打给你但你很忙所以我给你发短信了。"}]

text: If you're free this weekend we can go hiking But if it rains let's just stay in and play games.
meaning: 如果你这周末有空我们可以去徒步但如果下雨我们就待在家玩游戏。
examples_json: [{"en":"If you have time we can meet But if not let's talk tomorrow.","zh":"如果你有空我们可以见面但如果没有我们明天再聊。"}]

text: When I got home I was really hungry because I didn't eat lunch.
meaning: 我到家时特别饿因为没吃午饭。
examples_json: [{"en":"When I saw her I was happy because she passed the test.","zh":"我看到她时特别开心因为她通过了考试。"}]

text: She's very smart and she works hard so she always gets good grades.
meaning: 她很聪明而且很努力所以总是考得好。
examples_json: [{"en":"He's very kind and he helps others so everyone likes him.","zh":"他很善良而且帮助别人所以大家都喜欢他。"}]

text: I like both coffee and tea but if I have to choose I prefer coffee because it helps me wake up.
meaning: 咖啡茶我都喜欢但如果必须选我更喜欢咖啡因为它能让我清醒。
examples_json: [{"en":"I like both summer and winter but if I had to choose I prefer summer because it's warm.","zh":"夏天冬天我都喜欢但如果必须选我更喜欢夏天因为暖和。"}]

text: First we went to the museum After that we had lunch Then we walked in the park because the weather was nice.
meaning: 我们先去了博物馆然后吃了午饭然后在公园散步因为天气很好。
examples_json: [{"en":"First we went shopping After that we ate dinner Then we went home because it was late.","zh":"我们先去购物然后吃了晚饭然后回家了因为天色已晚。"}]

text: First I went to the store and bought some food Then I came home and cooked dinner After that I ate and watched TV.
meaning: 先去商店买了食物然后回家做晚饭之后吃饭看电视。
examples_json: [{"en":"First I went to the bank and cashed a check Then I went to the supermarket and bought groceries After that I went home and relaxed.","zh":"先去银行兑现支票然后去超市买杂货之后回家休息。"}]

text: Before I go to work I always take a shower and eat breakfast After I get home I usually relax and read a book.
meaning: 上班前总是洗澡吃早餐回家后通常放松看书。
examples_json: [{"en":"Before I go to school I always check my bag and have breakfast After I come back I usually do homework and watch TV.","zh":"上学前总是检查书包吃早餐回家后通常做作业看电视。"}]

text: I was late for work because I missed the bus so I had to take a taxi It was expensive but I had no choice.
meaning: 上班迟到因为错过了公交所以打了车很贵但没办法。
examples_json: [{"en":"I missed the train because I woke up late so I took the next one It was crowded but I arrived on time.","zh":"错过了火车因为起晚了所以坐了下一趟很挤但准时到了。"}]

text: She studied very hard because she wanted to pass the exam and she did it I'm so proud of her.
meaning: 她努力学习因为想通过考试她做到了真为她骄傲。
examples_json: [{"en":"He practiced every day because he wanted to win the competition and he did it I'm so happy for him.","zh":"他每天练习因为想赢得比赛他做到了真为他高兴。"}]

text: When I got to the station the train had already left If I had left home earlier I wouldn't have missed it.
meaning: 到车站时火车已经开了如果早点出门就不会错过。
examples_json: [{"en":"When I arrived at the store it had already closed If I had left earlier I wouldn't have missed it.","zh":"到商店时已经关门了如果早点出门就不会错过。"}]

text: I think this is a good idea because it's simple and easy to do If we try it we might get good results.
meaning: 我觉得这是个好主意因为它简单易行如果试试可能会有好结果。
examples_json: [{"en":"I think this plan is great because it's cheap and fast If we start now we might finish today.","zh":"我觉得这个计划很棒因为它便宜又快捷如果现在开始可能今天就能完成。"}]

text: I like living in the city because it's convenient and exciting However it's also crowded and expensive.
meaning: 我喜欢住在城市因为方便又刺激然而也很拥挤昂贵。
examples_json: [{"en":"I like living in the suburbs because it's quiet and peaceful However it's also boring and far from work.","zh":"我喜欢住在郊区因为安静平和然而也很无聊且远离工作。"}]

text: As long as you study hard you'll do well But if you don't practice enough you might fall behind.
meaning: 只要你努力学习就会表现好但如果不练习可能会落后。
examples_json: [{"en":"As long as you save money you'll be fine But if you spend too much you might run out.","zh":"只要你存钱就会没问题但如果不节制可能会花光。"}]

text: I think you should take the job because it's a good opportunity Besides you can learn a lot of new things there.
meaning: 我觉得你应该接受这份工作因为是个好机会而且能学到很多新东西。
examples_json: [{"en":"I think you should study abroad because it's a great experience Besides you can make friends from all over the world.","zh":"我觉得你应该出国留学因为很棒的经历而且能交到世界各地的朋友。"}]

text: In conclusion I believe that learning English is very important Not only can you talk to more people but you can also get a better job.
meaning: 总之我认为学英语很重要不仅能和更多人交流还能找到更好的工作。
examples_json: [{"en":"In conclusion I believe that exercise is very important Not only can you stay healthy but you can also feel happier.","zh":"总之我认为运动很重要不仅能保持健康还能更快乐。"}]
